chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1273 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4251/2020 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.4252/2020 (I Rule 10) 4. For hearing of main case 17-02-2022 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 16-12-2021, Petitioners’ Counsel was directed to place on record appointment orders for which regularization is being sought. Today, Petitioners’ Counsel submits that there are no appointment orders. In that case, no case is made out. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
